a:T222f,<div class="question">
<p>A quantity of an ideal gas is at a temperature <em>T</em> in a cylinder with a movable piston that traps a length <em>L</em> of the gas. The piston is moved so that the length of the trapped gas is reduced to <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mrow><mn>5</mn><mi>L</mi></mrow><mn>6</mn></mfrac></math> and the pressure of the gas doubles.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>What is the temperature of the gas at the end of the change?</p>
<p><br/>A.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mn>5</mn><mn>12</mn></mfrac><mi>T</mi></math><br/><br/>B.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mn>3</mn><mn>5</mn></mfrac><mi>T</mi></math><br/><br/>C.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mn>5</mn><mn>3</mn></mfrac><mi>T</mi></math><br/><br/>D.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mn>12</mn><mn>5</mn></mfrac><mi>T</mi></math></p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/3/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","3"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.SL.TZ2.10"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","3-2-modelling-a-gas"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>Some comments queried that the Laws of Thermodynamics are not on the syllabus.
